items.title: Ricky has the Sixers taking Allen Graves again. Really hard to argue against. Graves could theoretically help now, but if he doesn't, he's an ideal fit for the future next to a Maxey-Edgecombe backcourt.

items.title: Tyrese Maxey has been voted to the All-NBA Third Team.
items.author: Derek Bodner
items.body_excerpt:
Tyrese Maxey has been voted to the All-NBA Third Team.

Maxey was the leading vote getter among those on the Third Team, receiving 36 Second Team votes and 60 Third Team votes, appearing on a total of 96 out of 100 ballots.

items.title: Tyrese Maxey making All-NBA this year does not have any contractual / salary cap implications for the Sixers… yet. He would be eligible for a supermax extension next summer if he makes All-NBA against next season.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Tyrese Maxey making All-NBA this year does not have any contractual / salary cap implications for the Sixers… yet. He would be eligible for a supermax extension next summer if he makes All-NBA against next season.

items.title: Tyrese Maxey was one of the two biggest reasons the Sixers won 45 games and upset the Boston Celtics in the playoffs.
items.author: Austin Krell
items.body_excerpt:
Tyrese Maxey was one of the two biggest reasons the Sixers won 45 games and upset the Boston Celtics in the playoffs.

His jump from All-Star reserve to All-NBA Third Team is perhaps the best summary of what he did for his team this season:

www.si.com/nba/76ers/on...

items.title: Tyrese Maxey finished in 11th place in All-NBA voting, which made him the top player on the Third Team. He appeared on 96 of 100 ballots (36 votes for Second Team, 60 votes for Third Team).
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Tyrese Maxey finished in 11th place in All-NBA voting, which made him the top player on the Third Team. He appeared on 96 of 100 ballots (36 votes for Second Team, 60 votes for Third Team).

items.title: NEWS: Tyrese Maxey was named to All-NBA Third Team. He averaged 28.3 points, 6.6 assists, 4.1 rebounds, 1.9 steals and 0.8 blocks across 70 regular-season games in his sixth year in the league, leading the NBA with 38.0 minutes per game.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
NEWS: Tyrese Maxey was named to All-NBA Third Team. He averaged 28.3 points, 6.6 assists, 4.1 rebounds, 1.9 steals and 0.8 blocks across 70 regular-season games in his sixth year in the league, leading the NBA with 38.0 minutes per game.

This is Maxey's first career All-NBA nod.
